codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly set up the Next.js dashboard app with App Router, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui. The ABYSSE dark theme was properly configured with the required colors (background #020204, card #0a0a0f, primary #00FFFF, success/emerald #00FF88, foreground/text #e8e6e3, muted #9a9a9a). Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond + Outfit) are loaded. Auth utilities (api.ts, auth.ts, constants.ts), useAuth hook, and AuthGuard component were created. The root page redirects based on auth state. Build and typecheck pass.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker suggested pinning eslint to ^9 due to peer dependency conflicts with eslint-config-next. This could be documented as a known environment quirk.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker handoff mentioned eslint peer dependency resolution needed for eslint-config-next compatibility.

summary: Review passed. The dashboard setup and theme feature was fully implemented per requirements. Next.js app with ABYSSE theme, auth utilities, shadcn/ui components all working correctly. Minor observation about eslint peer dependency management.
